name: laser-welding-skills
description: Official laser welding skill module for Claude Code, Codex, OpenCode, Cursor, and MCP

scripts.build: npm run build -w @ethermeta/lasernexus-core && npm run build -w @ethermeta/lasernexus
scripts.test: npm run test -w @ethermeta/lasernexus-core && npm run test -w @ethermeta/lasernexus
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w @ethermeta/lasernexus-core && npm run lint -w @ethermeta/lasernexus
